description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to visualize Alpha band activity topography (8-13 Hz) using the Head Plot widget. Use the EEG recording located at '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. The Head Plot must be configured to display Band Power for the Alpha frequency range. Save a screenshot of the resulting dashboard to '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/alpha_topography.png'.
